title: 1.7 Item hold | Legacy Viewmodel
description: 1.7 Visuals mod on Lunar Client, Animations mod on Badlion Client, and similar others in a vanilla resource pack implementation for latest Minecraft: JE versions!
body:
**Thank you, dear viewer, so much! 🎉**

A neat lil thing that many surely missed... So you can see it now and _**complete your nostalgic image**!_

→ Includes general rules for items' display. Very rarely, though, some items may have different, separate rules set for them

**Works with everything** — needs to _go over all_ applied resource packs. Versions **from 1.16.5 to the latest one**!

**_Include_** me in the credits still when you use this in a pack of your own

# Examples with the tweak:
![Manifested in First person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8596f1363cfc7dd137288d8d71cfed2d54879d2.png)
_More to face_
![Manifested in Third person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a02c76b0f1678a627a7a2447c7f4a83e434c81e.png)
